inputs.label: True Airspeed
inputs.businessContext: True airspeed of the object relative to the air in meters per second.

businessContext_i18n.en: True airspeed of the object relative to the air in meters per second.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nesnenin havaya göre saniyede metre cinsinden gerçek hava hızı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wahre Fluggeschwindigkeit des Objekts relativ zur Luft in Metern pro Sekunde.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Vitesse air vraie de l'objet par rapport à l'air en mètres par seconde.
businessContext_i18n.es: Velocidad aerodinámica real del objeto respecto al aire en metros por segundo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: السرعة الجوية الحقيقية للجسم بالنسبة للهواء بوحدة متر في الثانية.

inputs.label: Ambient Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Ambient air temperature in degrees Celsius.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ambient air temperature in degrees Celsius.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Santigrat derece cinsinden ortam hava sıcaklığı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température ambiante de l'air en degrés Celsius.
businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura ambiente del aire en grados Celsius.
businessContext_i18n.ar: درجة حرارة الهواء المحيط بوحدة درجة مئوية.

inputs.label: Specific Heat Ratio (γ)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of specific heats; for air, γ = 1.4.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of specific heats; for air, γ = 1.4.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Özgül ısı oranı; hava için γ = 1,4.
businessContext_i18n.de: Verhältnis der spezifischen Wärmen; für Luft γ = 1,4.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rapport des chaleurs spécifiques ; pour l'air, γ = 1,4.
businessContext_i18n.es: Relación de calores específicos; para el aire, γ = 1.4.

inputs.label: Specific Gas Constant
inputs.businessContext: Specific gas constant for the gas; for dry air, R ≈ 287 J/(kg·K).

businessContext_i18n.en: Specific gas constant for the gas; for dry air, R ≈ 287 J/(kg·K).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gaz için özgül gaz sabiti; kuru hava için R ≈ 287 J/(kg·K).
businessContext_i18n.de: Spezifische Gaskonstante für das Gas; für trockene Luft R ≈ 287 J/(kg·K).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Constante spécifique des gaz pour le gaz ; pour l'air sec, R ≈ 287 J/(kg·K).
businessContext_i18n.es: Constante específica del gas; para aire seco, R ≈ 287 J/(kg·K).
businessContext_i18n.ar: ثابت الغاز النوعي للغاز؛ للهواء الجاف، R ≈ 287 جول/(كجم·كلفن).
